revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''urn:mrn:iala:dic:0901042e

VTS certification log is a record of certificates and endorsements awarded to VTS personnel during their VTS career.

Source: IALA Guideline G1156 Recruitment, training and assessment of VTS Personnel
